zh.Rougham, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可盧加姆
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Drury of Rougham,是Sir William Drury和Catharine Swynford的兒子，於1429年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可盧加姆。他於大約1455年與Catharine Whitewell在英國英格蘭素福爾可盧加姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1486年12月12日在他的家鄉享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可盧加姆。

zh-hans.Rougham, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可盧加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Drury of Rougham,是Sir William Drury和Catharine Swynford的儿子，于1429年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可盧加姆。他于大约1455年与Catharine Whitewell在英国英格兰素福爾可盧加姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1486年12月12日在他的家乡享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可盧加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Drury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Drury of Rougham, was born in 1429, in Rougham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom as the son of Sir William Drury and Catharine Swynford. He married Catharine Whitewell about 1455, in Rougham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 December 1486, in his hometown, at the age of 57, and was buried in Rougham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Drury of Rougham, est né en 1429, à Rougham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Sir William Drury et Catharine Swynford. Il a épousé Catharine Whitewell environ 1455, à Rougham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 décembre 1486, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Rougham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Drury of Rougham, wurde 1429 in Rougham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Sir William Drury und Catharine Swynford geboren. Er hat um 1455 in Rougham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Catharine Whitewell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Dezember 1486 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Rougham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Drury of Rougham, è nato il nel 1429 nel Rougham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Sir William Drury e Catharine Swynford. Lui sposato Catharine Whitewell circa 1455, nel Rougham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 dicembre 1486, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Rougham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Rougham, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクロウアム
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Drury of Rougham,は1429年にイギリスイギリススフォルクロウアムでSir William DruryとCatharine Swynfordの息子として生まれた。約1455年にイギリスイギリススフォルクロウアムでCatharine Whitewellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1486年12月12日に故郷で57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクロウアムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Drury of Rougham,(은)는 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 루그함에서 Sir William Drury(와)과 Catharine Swynford의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1455년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 루그함에서 Catharine Whitewell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1486년 12월 12일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 루그함에 묻혔다.

mn.Rougham, Suffolk, England: Rougham, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Drury of Rougham, nasceu em 1429, em Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Sir William Drury e Catharine Swynford. Ele casou-se com Catharine Whitewell aproximadamente 1455, em Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de dezembro de 1486, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Drury of Rougham, родился в 1429 г. в местности роугам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Sir William Drury и Catharine Swynford. Он женился на женщине по имени Catharine Whitewell около 1455 г. в местности роугам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 декабря 1486 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности роугам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Drury of Rougham, nació en 1429, en Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Sir William Drury y Catharine Swynford. Se casó con Catharine Whitewell aproximadamente 1455, en Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de diciembre de 1486, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
